title: Alaska SBDC Strengthens Business Ties in Valdez through Strategic Workshops and Networking
summary: In the town of Valdez, known for its role in the Trans-Alaska Pipeline and tourism sector, Ruth Wolfe, Rural Business Advisor of the Alaska Small Business Development Center (SBDC) , engaged with the local business community through a series of impactful events.
